hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.48 km from property

snippets.snippet: They have restaurant at the rooftop
The hotel very nice, staff friendly.
Very clean and has a big room

address.address1: Jl. Sultan Iskandar Muda No.6, Lambung, Kec. Meuraxa, Kota Banda Aceh, Aceh

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.0/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.0/10 on value for money

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Children 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

reviewSnippets: The hotel very nice, staff friendly.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is nice, clean, comfortable, and all the staff are friendly. It's very pleasant to stay long, and the price is also affordable. It's really great, definitely next time I want to stay there again, hehe.
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya bagus, bersih, nyaman, dan semua pegawainya ramah buat menginap lama enak banget harganya juga terjangkau bagus sekali pokonya nextime mau nginep lagi di sana heheh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: I think it could be slightly cheaper and the bathroom could be better maintained.
comments.reviewPositives: Good stay before morning trip to Pulau Weh by ferry. Clean spacious room. The restaurant on the rooftop floor is good.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It is a must to stay here when going to Banda Aceh, the location is strategic in my opinion. The rooms are very clean, fragrant, and very comfortable, the staff is also very friendly, you definitely won't be disappointed staying here. If there were 10 stars, I would give it 10 stars. The best ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
comments.originalComment: Harus bgt kalo ke Banda Aceh wajib nginap disini, lokasinya strategis menurutku. Terus untuk kamar bersih pwol, wangi, nyaman bgt, staff nya juga ramah bgt, pokoknya gak bakal kecewa sih nginap dsni. Kalo ada bintang 10 keknya harus bintang 10 ku kasih. The best ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
- Windows are not soundproof
- AC takes a while to cool down the room
comments.reviewPositives:
- Not so far from the city centre
- Affordable price

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Staff very polite and helpful
Clean and big room
I think its new hotel
I like it because alfamart just in front of the hotel
And only 5-6 mins to ferry jetty to sabang
They have restaurant at the rooftop
Will come again for sure!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Habia algun pelo en la colcha de la cama que no era nuestro 😐
comments.reviewPositives: Lo amplia que era la habitación y que tuviese desayuno incluido, es muy util alojarse aqui teniendo el ferry cerca

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: All the staff are friendly and fast in responding, the location is also in the city, I'm really satisfied staying at Fandika Hotel.
comments.originalComment: Semua staf nya ramah2 dan fast respon,lokasi jg dikota,pokoknya puas nginap di fandika hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Accueil sympathique, restaurant au Rooftop sur place grande chambre, propre super content de notre séjour ici
comments.reviewTitle: Propre et confortable, très proche du port

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The service and its staff deserve a thumbs up 👍🏼 keep it up.
comments.reviewTitle: friendly staff, clean room, okay basically
comments.originalTitle: staf yang ramah, kamar bersih, oke pkoknya
comments.originalComment: pelayanan dan stafnya patut diacungi jempol 👍🏼 pertahankan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Modernes Hotel in der Nähe des Fährterminals, das Personal ist liebevoll und das Frühstück Top!
comments.reviewTitle: Zwischenstopp am Weg nach Pulau Weh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The mattress is really comfortable. I didn't expect the mattress to be this nice. The pillow is just not very comfortable, hehe. Good location.
comments.originalComment: Kasur nya enak banget. Ngga expect tadinya kasur nya akan enak. Bantal nya aja kurang enak hehehe. Lokasi bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: badkamer een beetje karig, maar ook wel weer goed.

heel netjes, ruime kamer.
5 min van Port  en warm water met de douche !!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Plus:
Decent hotel. Good WiFi. Rooftop breakfast view was nice. Breakfast was nice.

Minus:
When you shower, the water pools on the bathroom floor and doesn’t drain very well.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Lähellä satamaa, mistä laivat pulau Wehille lähtivät.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The staff is unprofessional, disturbing the guests' privacy by knocking on the door and asking about the spa in the room. That is a matter of privacy. Then after those inquiries, the electricity in the room went out, and a technician came to fix it, and I suspect whether this is being eavesdropped on or how my privacy is disturbed by that. Because only my room lost power, while the other rooms did not. I do not recommend staying here if you want to heal alone.
comments.originalComment: staf nya tdk profesional, terganggu dgn privasi tamu ngetok2 pintu nanya sama spa dikamar. padahal itu privasi. terus setelah menanyakam itu listrik kamar mati, dan datang teknisi utk perbaiki dan saya curiga apa ini di sadap atau bagaimana sehingga privasi saya terganggu dgn hal itu. karna kamar saya aja yang mati kamar yg lain tidak mati. saya tdk merekomendasi menginap disni jika utk ingin healing sendirian
